3010980.name: GODPROOF
3010980.description:
Forcefully placed on an alien world by a foreboding entity, Raiden must find a way to safely return to his home world. He travels with Eve, an effervescent sorcerer who promises to help Raiden in his endeavours. Together, they eventually uncover the sinister truth behind Raiden's past and his true nature.

Uniquely, applicable companion characters will be assigned naturally to your party as the story progresses. Despite this, your choices matter! Explore the world and form alliances with new individuals. Completing their requests will yield great rewards. Maximize the effectiveness of your companion's abilities with rare consumable items and accessories.

The battle system has been modified to have instant actions while using a turn-based order. Typically, Raiden and his companions start the first turn of battle, and the turn order is based on a character's speed/agility statistics. Each party member and enemy have one turn to use an item or skill. RMMV Plugins have been utilized to greatly enhance the battle visuals such as camera tracking, breathing enemies, and more!

GODPROOF is powered by RPG Maker MV. Many gameplay features shown in the promotional material are not native to the RPG Maker MV engine. Various plugins have been utilized to make the gameplay more immersive and enjoyable for the player, such as yet not limited to:

✦ Autosave - Prevents the loss of data in the event of game engine overload.

✦ Quest Journal - Track your story progress, see detailed objectives and potential rewards.

✦ Character Busts - Visual novel-style character busts displayed when in conversations.

✦ Fast Travel - An interface to quickly teleport between major locations.

✦ Multiple Accessories - Equip to a maximum of 3 accessories per party member.

✦ Messages Upgrade - Letter sounds for character voices, animated text, and more!

✦ WASD Movement - Abolishes the nightmare that is arrow-key based movement.
